claude.message: fix: Capture Claude: lines in User/Action response cards

added: if (boldOnly && (inExCard || inUaCard || (i + 3 < lines.length && lines.slice(i+1, i+4).some(function(l) { return l.trim().match(/^`<(example_user_memories|user)|^(User|Action|Claude):/); })))) {
removed: if (boldOnly && (inExCard || inUaCard || (i + 3 < lines.length && lines.slice(i+1, i+4).some(function(l) { return l.trim().match(/^`<(example_user_memories|user)|^(User|Action):/); })))) {

claude.summary: This change updated the system to recognize lines starting with "Claude:" in addition to "User:" and "Action:". The update allows the system to capture and format Claude's lines in response cards, making it more effective at handling conversations.

claude.message: feat: Redesign claude.html with Anthropic docs aesthetic
claude.summary: This change updates the design of CLAUDE's system prompt to match Anthropic's style, making it look more modern and consistent. The update includes new layouts and colors for things like tables of contents, preference cards, and example groups. Overall, it's a visual refresh to make the system more visually appealing and user-friendly.

claude.message: feat: Add favicon to Claude System Prompt Explorer
claude.summary: This change adds a small icon, called a favicon, to the browser tab for CLAUDE's System Prompt Explorer. The icon is stored in a file called "favicon.ico" and will show up next to the page title in the browser tab. It's a minor update that improves the overall look of the page.

added: The user's name is GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_NAME , and their email address is HANDLE@gmail.com.
removed: The user's name is Ásgeir Thor Johnson, and their email address is asgeirtj@gmail.com.

gemini.summary: Someone updated the system prompt to change the user's name and email address. The old name "Ásgeir Thor Johnson" and email "asgeirtj@gmail.com" were swapped out for a more generic "GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_NAME" and "HANDLE@gmail.com". This likely makes the system more flexible and able to work with different users.

grok.summary: GROK's system prompt had an update to its web search and X keyword search features. The update doesn't seem to have changed much, but it did reorganize the way the features are defined, likely to make them work better or be easier to maintain. Overall, the search features still work the same way, allowing you to look up stuff on the web or search for specific posts on X.
